auth.consent: I consent to the AI helping my child with learning.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ArubaLeren, we take your child's privacy very seriously. Below we explain how we handle data.
privacy.whatWeCollectDesc: We only store your child's first name, grade, and learning progress. Nothing more.
privacy.whatWeDontDoDesc: We don't sell data. We don't show ads. We don't share anything with others.
privacy.howWeUseAIDesc: Koko (our AI tutor) uses the data only to help your child learn. Conversations are saved so Koko knows what your child was working on.
privacy.parentControlDesc: You decide if your child participates. You give consent when signing up. You can stop at any time and we will delete all data.

home.title: Welcome to ArubaLeren
home.subtitle: Personal tutoring for every child on Aruba

features.ai: AI tutor Koko helps your child

privacyPolicy.title: ArubaLeren Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.introText: ArubaLeren is an online tutoring platform. Children on Aruba get help from Koko, our AI tutor. Koko helps with six subjects: language, mathematics, reading comprehension, history, geography, and natural sciences.
privacyPolicy.dataCollectionIntro: We store as little as possible. This is everything we save:
dataItems: Chat conversations with Koko, our AI tutor
Progress per subject (how learning is going)
privacyPolicy.dataCollectionNote: That's all. No last name. No address. No photos.
privacyPolicy.whyText: Every piece of data has a purpose. We use the first name so Koko can address your child. The age and grade help Koko set the right difficulty level. We save conversations so Koko knows what your child was working on. We store progress so you can see how things are going.
notDoItems: We don't sell data to others
We don't share data with other companies
We don't use data for anything other than tutoring
privacyPolicy.aiTitle: How does the AI tutor work?
privacyPolicy.aiText: Koko only uses the data to help your child learn. Conversations are saved so Koko knows what your child was working on last time. This helps Koko provide better help. The AI doesn't do anything else with the data.
parentControlItems: You give consent when signing up
You can stop at any time
If you stop, we delete all your child's data
You can always ask what data we have
privacyPolicy.consentText: During registration, you check a box. This gives consent for the AI to help your child learn. Without consent, your child cannot start.
privacyPolicy.contactText: Send an email to info@arubaleren.com. We'll respond as soon as possible.
